name: No Response Follow-Up Sequence
description: 3-touch cold outreach sequence for contacts who haven't replied

config.subject: Quick question for {{contact.firstName}}
config.body:
Hey {{contact.firstName}},

I came across your work and had a quick question about how you're currently handling [pain point].

Would you be open to a 15-minute call this week?

Best,
{{user.name}}

config.subject: Following up, {{contact.firstName}}
config.body:
Hey {{contact.firstName}},

Just circling back on my last email — wanted to make sure it didn't get buried.

Is this still relevant for you?

Best,
{{user.name}}

config.subject: I made this for you, {{contact.firstName}}
config.body:
Hey {{contact.firstName}},

I put together a short video specifically about the problem I mentioned — I think you'll find it valuable even if the timing isn't right.

[Video Link]

Let me know what you think.

{{user.name}}

config.subject: Great to hear from you, {{contact.firstName}}
config.body:
Thanks for getting back to me, {{contact.firstName}}!

I'd love to connect and learn more about what you're working on. Here's a link to grab 15 minutes:

[Calendar Link]

Looking forward to it,
{{user.name}}
